phase3_attempts.name: log-eah_from_scratch
phase3_attempts.result: FAILED - all tasks degraded, all R² negative
phase3_attempts.cause: multi-task interference from log-transformed EAH targets

phase3_attempts.name: log-eah_frozen_backbone
phase3_attempts.result: FAILED - EAH head did not converge (val_loss stuck at 3.94)
phase3_attempts.cause: frozen backbone features not suited for log-raw target space

phase3_attempts.name: v3_architecture_upgrade
phase3_attempts.cause: insufficient VRAM for larger model at batch_size=4

log_eah_conclusion: log-transform of EAH targets degrades multi-task performance. The shared encoder cannot simultaneously produce features optimal for linearly-scaled Ef/BG and log-scaled EAH. Separate models per task or post-hoc calibration are recommended instead.
recommendations: 1. Apply temperature scaling (Ef: 0.387, Eah: 1.009, BG: 0.973) during inference
2. For EAH improvement: train a separate model exclusively for EAH with log-transform
3. For architecture upgrade: use cloud GPU (e.g., T4) for v3 model training
4. Add more training data for EAH (currently many zeros, high skew)
5. Use ensemble methods to improve calibration and reduce bias
